event: Abstract geometric composition referencing Michelangelo's Sistine ceiling
description: An abstract geometric painting with flat areas of color. A large dark navy triangle occupies the lower left. The upper portion features teal-green sky-like fields with simplified cloud forms rendered in blue and brown hatching. Beige angular shapes with rows of dark circles extend from the right side. The composition is bordered by a thin dark line. The style is hard-edged abstraction with no recognizable figures or narrative content.
